events.title: ADR created
events.description: An ADR event emitted by the architect workflow.

events.title: Agent output completed
events.description: Runtime emits this when an agent run completes successfully.

events.title: Agent output failed
events.description: Runtime emits this when an agent run fails.

events.description: Runtime emits this when an agent run is blocked.
